name: pje-download
description: PJE Download - Download de processos do PJE/TJBA

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web "pnpm --filter backend start" "pnpm --filter frontend start"
